InvLockoutFault.description: One of the inverters has a critical fault impacting VC.

PcmLvOvercurrentFault.description: LV rail from the HV DCDC was overcurrent.

SoftwareBspd.description: Brakes and apps are active at same time.

MissingCRITHeartbeat.description: Missing heartbeat signal from the CRIT.

MissingBMSHeartbeat.description: Missing heartbeat signal from the BMS.

MissingFSMHeartbeat.description: Missing heartbeat signal from the FSM.

FrontRightInverterFault.description: Front right inverter entered fault state.

RearLeftInverterFault.description: Rear left inverter entered fault state.

MissingRSMHeartbeat.description: Missing heartbeat signal from the RSM.

MissingDAMHeartbeat.description: Missing heartbeat signal from the VC

InverterRetry.description: Inverter fault occured in drive state

StackOverflow.description: An RTOS task stack overflowed on the previous boot cycle.

FlowRateInputOutOfRange.description: Input to app_pumpControl_setFlowRate out of range

BatteryRailOvercurrentFault.description: LV rail from the 18650 batteries was overcurrent.

SbgInitFailed.description: Initializing the SBG Ellipse GPS failed

DriveModeOverride.description: Override requested drive mode to vanilla if sensor fails

Imu1Fault.description: IMU1 has faulted (due to failed init or transaction).

Imu2Fault.description: IMU2 has faulted (due to failed init or transaction).

Imu3Fault.description: IMU3 has faulted (due to failed init or transaction).
